Title: Expands the state rental registry identifying lead hazards to include all residential dwellings meeting certain conditions
Summary: Expands the state rental registry identifying lead hazards to include all residential dwellings that are potentially eligible for rental, lease, let or hiring out, and are located within communities of concern.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the public health law, in relation to expanding the state rental registry identifying lead hazards to include all residential dwellings meeting certain conditions
